title: pelargonium × idion
intro: Pelargonium × idion, also known as Rose Geranium, is a hybrid species of the pelargonium genus, characterized by its fragrant leaves and pink to purple flowers. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly in its essential oils, which contain geraniol and linalool, known for their antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause, as well as its antimicrobial properties that can aid in wound healing and skin issues. The herbal preparations of Rose Geranium include essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally, under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
